antipatterns.name: Rainbow UI
antipatterns.bad: Using 6 different accent colors across one page for 'variety'
antipatterns.why: Color loses meaning — if everything is colorful, nothing is highlighted
antipatterns.fix: One accent color, three semantic colors (danger/success/warning), greys for everything else

antipatterns.name: Dark text on colored background without contrast check
antipatterns.bad: bg-warning text-primary — lighter amber backgrounds fail badly
antipatterns.why: #D97706 (amber) may pass AA but lighter variants don't — easy to miss without a checker
antipatterns.fix: Always check contrast. Use -subtle variants (light tinted bg) with dark text instead

antipatterns.name: Color-only state signaling
antipatterns.bad: Turning a border red to signal error — no icon, no message
antipatterns.why: 8% of males are colorblind and cannot distinguish red from green
antipatterns.fix: Red border + error icon + error message text. All three, always.

antipatterns.name: Pure black text on white
antipatterns.why: Too harsh — causes halation (white bleeding into dark text) on bright screens
antipatterns.fix: #09090B or #111111 on white — visually indistinguishable but eliminates harshness

antipatterns.name: Pure black background
antipatterns.why: Creates excessive contrast and looks low-quality on OLED screens
antipatterns.fix: #09090B or #0F172A — near-black with slight warmth or coolness

antipatterns.name: Gradient overuse
antipatterns.bad: Gradients on buttons, cards, inputs, backgrounds — everything
antipatterns.why: Gradients age quickly and read as decorative rather than structural
antipatterns.fix: One subtle gradient maximum — hero section or marketing illustration. UI chrome stays flat.

antipatterns.name: Semitransparent colors on unknown backgrounds
antipatterns.bad: text-black/70 on a surface that might be colored
antipatterns.why: rgba opacity composites with whatever is beneath — unpredictable in dark mode or colored panels
antipatterns.fix: Use explicit color tokens — never rely on opacity for color values in components

antipatterns.name: Low contrast 'modern' aesthetic
antipatterns.bad: text-gray-300 on white (#D1D5DB = 1.6:1) as body text
antipatterns.why: Fails WCAG AA. Affects ~10% of users with visual impairment
antipatterns.fix: text-secondary (#52525B = 7.4:1) minimum for any meaningful text

color_system: All colors reference tokens — no raw hex values in component files
Page uses bg-base → bg-surface → bg-subtle hierarchy correctly
Accent color appears in ≤10% of visible screen area
All text meets WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 body, 3:1 large/UI)
Semantic colors (danger/success/warning) paired with icon, not color alone
Dark mode tested — all tokens have dark variants defined
